task_summaries.task_scope: Identify temporal or network segment boundaries that correlate with shifts in structural regimes using evidence e8 and e9.
Compare class-conditioned structural variation patterns across identified regimes using evidence e10 and e23.
Assess model sensitivity to regime heterogeneity focusing on feature dependencies and shortcut-like signals using evidence e24.
Evaluate potential for regime-aware modeling or detection strategies by verifying local consistency and cardinality of heterogeneous regime features using evidence e8 and e23.
